system.description:
An oval shield with crescent cut-outs. In hand: +1 AC except when vulnerable. Strapped on the front: +1 AC except when vulnerable (2 stone, no Specialization bonus). Strapped on the back: +1 AC against attacks from behind (no Specialization bonus). 1 stone.

Judges Journal optional shield rules (pp. 407–408). Enable the shield-variant overlay to apply the type-specific rules; otherwise it behaves as a standard +1 AC shield.
